content.principles: 1.7 uses Array + Linked List; 1.8 uses Array + Linked List + Red-Black Tree. Treeification occurs when chain length > 8 and array size >= 64. Resize factor is 0.75. 1.8 uses tail insertion and maintains order during resize to avoid infinite loops.
content.pitfalls: Not thread-safe; use ConcurrentHashMap in multi-threaded environments. 1.7 head insertion can cause infinite loops during resize. Hash collisions can degrade performance to O(n) without treeification.
